segments.text: A Song of Ascents. Of David.
Behold, how good and pleasant it is when brothers dwell together in unity!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: It is like the precious oil on the head,
running down on the beard, on Aaron's beard,
running down on the collar of his robes!
It is like the dew of Hermon, which falls on the mountains of Zion.
For there the Lord has commanded the blessing, life forevermore.
